title: NGKsDevFabric Certification Bootstrap Schema
description: Defines the minimum required certification readiness structure created by the bootstrap generator. All assets generated by this tool carry _bootstrap_managed=true and placeholder_status='template_not_real_certification_result'.

modes.name: init
modes.description: Create missing certification assets only. Preserve everything that already exists, whether bootstrap-managed or user-authored.

modes.name: safe-upgrade
modes.description: Add missing required artifacts while preserving all existing assets. Semantically identical to init; named differently to communicate team workflow intent (upgrading an incomplete structure without touching existing files).

modes.name: overwrite
modes.description: Create missing assets and overwrite bootstrap-managed assets (_bootstrap_managed=true). User-authored files (without the marker) are always preserved.

required_assets.description: Top-level certification contract. Locates baseline_root and scenario_index_path.
Baseline identity: baseline_version must be non-empty and in supported_baseline_versions.
Per-scenario baseline scores. scenarios[].scores must contain all _REQUIRED_SCENARIO_SCORE_KEYS.
Aggregate baseline metrics. Must contain all six _REQUIRED_AGG_METRICS keys as numeric values.
Scenario proof manifest. Must contain scenario_id. Directory name must match _SCENARIO_DIR_RE = r'^(\d{8}_\d{6})_(.+)$'.
Actual outcome for this scenario proof. Must contain actual_result.
Diagnostic scores for this scenario. Must contain all _REQUIRED_SCENARIO_SCORE_KEYS, total, max_total.

do_not_create.reason: The compatibility check only runs when this directory exists. Creating it would trigger snapshot compat checks that are not part of the bootstrap scope.

decision_policy_defaults.note: With placeholder_value=0.5 for both baseline and current, delta=0.0 which satisfies stable_tolerance_band → CERTIFIED_STABLE
